author: dildick
body:
* LUTs to map wiregroup onto min and max half-strip number that it crosses in ME1/1. 
* LUTs for 16 partition GE21. 
* Split GEMCSC LUTs by layer. 
* Move to subdirectories

FYI @tahuang1991.
title: LUTs to map wiregroup onto min and max half-strip number that it crosses in ME1/1
